name: Airbyte
description: Monitor Airbyte data integration pipelines for connection status and workspace access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Airbyte Cloud at https://cloud.airbyte.com
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Airbyte Cloud Settings → API Keys

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Airbyte workspaces for data pipeline infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Airbyte workspace users and their data pipeline access
